mapper.select: SELECT BL_ID, BLUUID, LX, MS, YXQQ, YXQZ, XYBZ, JCGHBL, HYGHBL, SDGHBL, XJGHBL, SJGHBL, SZGHBL, QGZGHBL, SJCJBL, SDSJBL, SWJGBL, TJ, YXJ, MRBZ, JYM FROM CS_FPBL WHERE XYBZ = 'Y' ORDER BY YXJ ASC
SELECT * FROM gh_qsjshkrj T WHERE (#{rkrqStart} <= T.RKRQ and T.RKRQ <= #{rkrqEnd}) AND T.LX = '1'
